title: Rust impl: Yggdrasil address as primary
description: Implement native Yggdrasil addressing in Rust from spec rule-set v2: current AddrForKey over raw Ed25519 public keys, key-derived link-local IID, no baseline ULA, full-/128 local routing, collision handling, and canonical address/SCHC vectors. Non-local Yggdrasil forwarding remains disabled pending project-LICHEN-zt3c.2.
